title: Pixel art autism creature totem of undying
description: Replaces the totem of undying with a delightful little neurodivergent creature
body:
Replaces the totem of undying with a delightful little neurodivergent creature


I made this because I was very board.

 

I hope you enjoy!

 

PS if Minecraft says the resource pack is incombatible with your version it isnt, the pack only replaces one texture and should work on any version of the game with the totem!
